creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
That's still the same problem.

[build] |   | `-- Installing rubygem-execjs-2.7.0...
[build] |   |   `-- Installing node-9.2.1...
pkg-static: node-9.2.1 conflicts with node8-8.9.3 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/node

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): /packages/All/rubygem-rails4-4.2.10.txz
*** Error code 70

I've added NODE8 option to devel/rubygem-execjs.
